title: Smaller Wind Charges
description: Makes Wind Charges Smaller On Your Screen!
body:
**Smaller Wind Charges**

**READ THIS QUICK!**

(NO OPTIFINE NEEDED!) (Screenshots in the gallery include a saturation mod, the modified saturations bars are NOT included in this RESOURCE PACK and is a COMPLETELY DIFFERENT MOD.) (LEGAL, DO NOT STEAL OR MAKE ANY MODIFICATIONS TO THIS MOD AND MAKE IT YOUR OWN, THIS BELONGS TO skai6214 AND skai6214 ONLY.)

**FAQ**

**What does this pack do/What are the features?**

This resource pack modifies the appearance of wind charges in your Minecraft world by making them dynamically shrink when held in your hand. Normally, the wind charge item can be quite large and obstruct your view, especially when you're in the middle of combat, exploring, or just navigating the environment. This pack resolves that issue by scaling the wind charge down, so it becomes smaller and more manageable in your view, making your screen less cluttered.

**Why would I want this?**

You’d want this pack if you often find yourself using wind charges but are frustrated by how large and obstructive they are when held. Whether you're PvPing, navigating, or just enjoying your game, this pack improves your visibility by making the wind charge less intrusive. With the item being smaller, you can focus on the action or the environment without the distraction of a giant item blocking your field of view.
